tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def all-linear (linear_issues))

(def linear-map (reduce (fn [m issue] (assoc m (:id issue) issue)) {} all-linear))

(defn pr-issue-not-done [pr]
  (let [lid (:closes_linear pr)
        issue (get linear-map lid)]
    (and issue (not= (:state issue) "done"))))

(def prs-not-done (filter pr-issue-not-done prs-with-linear))
